title: Hieronymus Bosch-style AI future painting
description: Creates a surreal painting about the state of AI in 2025 in the style of Hieronymus Bosch.
content: generate a Hieronymus Bosch style painting of the state of AI in 2025
author: POM

title: Cat drinking cola illustration
description: A playful prompt that makes a cat drinking Coca-Cola, suitable for fun posts or memes.
content: Generate an image of a cat drinking coca cola
author: Min Choi

title: Where’s Waldo Star Wars scene
description: Generates a dense “Where’s Waldo” style illustration featuring all Star Wars characters on Tatooine, including Waldo.
content: A where is waldo image showing all Star Wars characters on Tatooine
author: CREACAS

title: MrBeast-style YouTube channel redesign
description: Creates a YouTube channel page that looks like a real MrBeast layout but with all thumbnails replaced by a themed tournament.
content: A YouTube channel page identical to the real MrBeast layout, same camera angle and perspective as the reference photo. Keep the YouTube interface, channel banner, icons, buttons, and sidebar exactly the same. Replace all video thumbnails with new custom thumbnails about {argument name="theme" default="Nano Banana VS Cartoon Banana Boxing Tournament"}
author: Higgsfield AI 🧩

title: 90s-style film portrait from a reference photo
description: A long, detailed prompt to turn a reference photo of a man into a warm, grainy 1990s film-style portrait in a cozy indoor setting.
content:
Create a 90s style portrait of the same man as in the reference photo, keeping his exact facial features and expression. The image should look as if it was clicked with a 1990s film camera, slightly grainy with warm tones. The scene takes place in a cozy, dimly lit room where a camera flash is clearly visible, casting a focused light on the man while the background remains slightly shadowed.
Only the upper half of his body is visible in the frame. He is posing elegantly, wearing a simple yet stylish 90s outfit such as a casual shirt or turtleneck that complements the warm indoor setting.
The background features a white wall with a few magazine clippings and posters of Hollywood stars from the 90s pinned to it, adding a nostalgic touch. The overall mood should evoke a classic retro portrait look, natural yet artistically lit.
author: Johnn

title: Seasonal Korean restaurant menu image
description: Generates a designed menu image for a Korean restaurant concept with seasonal, organic ingredients.
content: I'm opening a traditional concept restaurant in {argument name="location" default="Marin"} called {argument name="restaurant_name" default="Haein"}. It focuses on Korean food cooked with organic, farm-fresh ingredients, with a rotating menu based on what's seasonal. I want you to design an image - a menu incorporating the following {argument name="menu_details" default="[list of dishes, sections, and design notes]"}
author: Min Choi

title: Cozy TV-watching group of fluffy characters
description: A richly described medium-shot scene of 14 fluffy characters squeezed together watching a vintage TV in a cozy living room.
content: A medium shot of the {argument name="character_count" default="14"} fluffy characters sitting squeezed together side-by-side on a worn beige fabric sofa and on the floor. They are all facing forwards, watching a vintage, wooden-boxed television set placed on a low wooden table in front of the sofa. The room is dimly lit, with warm light from a window on the left and the glow from the TV illuminating the creatures' faces and fluffy textures. The background is a cozy, slightly cluttered living room with a braided rug, a bookshelf with old books, and rustic kitchen elements in the background. The overall atmosphere is warm, cozy, and amused.
author: Nick St. Pierre

title: 9-image Instagram-style weekend photo dump
description: Generates a nine-tile Instagram grid showing different candid and lifestyle moments from a person’s weekend.
content: Generate a 9-image ‘photo dump’ grid of this person’s weekend: a mirror selfie, a café shot, friends at dinner, a blurry party photo, a walking shot, a laptop/coffee work shot, a pet moment, a sunset, and a candid laugh.
author: Shweta

title: Glossy magazine article layout from long text
description: This prompt takes a long article text and renders it as a styled glossy magazine article on a desk with photos and modern typography.
content: Put this whole text, verbatim, into a photo of a glossy magazine article on a desk, with photos, beautiful typography design, pull quotes and brave formatting. The text: {argument name="article_text" default="[paste the full unformatted article here]"}
author: fofr

title: Old photo restoration prompt
description: Restores an old, heavily damaged photograph by removing defects and reconstructing faces while keeping the original identity intact.
content: Restore this old, heavily damaged photo by removing all visible scratches, dents, folds, and stains. Reconstruct missing or distorted facial features naturally and realistically while preserving the original identity and expressions of the person. Maintain the authentic
author: Coffin

title: Every meme character in Where’s Wally style
description: Creates a chaotic poster featuring every known meme character illustrated in a dense Where’s Wally search-and-find style.
content: Every known meme character in the style of "Where's Wally"
author: Higgsfield AI 🧩

title: High-quality portrait upscaling and enhancement
description: Upscales and enhances an image to 4K, improving detail and realistic skin texture while preserving composition and color.
content: Enhance and upscale the image while keeping composition and colors identical. Eliminate blur and give the skin a lifelike, detailed look: clear pores, faint fine lines, light freckles, and realistic transitions between shadow and highlight. Maintain the tone of the light
author: Halim Alrasihi

title: Sharpen blurred lifestyle photo
description: Transforms a blurry photo into an ultra-sharp, realistic lifestyle image without changing the overall composition or objects.
content: Take the provided blurred photo and transform it into an ultra-sharp, realistic lifestyle shot without changing the composition or objects.
author: Halim Alrasihi

title: Live-action version of an existing image
description: A simple base prompt to convert an animated or stylized frame into a realistic live-action filmed version of the same scene.
content: show me the live action filmed version of image 1
author: Brent Lynch

title: Outfit transfer between two photos
description: Moves clothing from one reference image onto a person in another image, making the clothing intentionally oversized.
content:
take clothes from image1 and put on person in image2. make sri that the clothe is oversized

2k quality 0,14
author: zhenya

title: New Pokémon pixel art battle scene
description: Uses an existing pixel-art battle scene as reference and generates a new battle with different Pokémon and environment.
content: change the scene to a new battle and environment with new pokemon

title: Holiday photos across a lifetime
description: Generates a series of holiday-style photos showing the same person aging up to 80 years old.
content: Generate the holiday photo of this person through the ages up to 80 years old
author: Min Choi

title: Realistic cliff rescue composite
description: Composes a realistic cliff rescue scene using provided photos of a man and woman and a mountain background style reference.
content: Realistic cliff rescue, use man photo as hero, woman photo as one slipping, match sketch side pose and composition precisely, mountain photo (style reference) for background.
author: Halim Alrasihi

title: Space shuttle diagram in space
description: Generates a diagram-style image of a space shuttle in outer space, useful for educational or illustrative content.
content: GENERATE A DIAGRAM OF SPACE SHUTTLE IN SPACE
author: Nano Banana Pro

title: Japanese labeled-ingredients dish photo
description: A Japanese prompt asking for all ingredients of a dish to be shown on a plate with labels for names and amounts.
content: この料理のすべての原材料をお皿の上に見せて、名前と量をラベル付けしてください。
author: Higgsfield AI 🧩

title: Times Square icon on many screens
description: A short prompt to place your profile icon across many screens in Times Square, ideal for playful, larger‑than‑life avatar renders.
content: {argument name="subject_icon" default="my icon"} in a tons of screen in time square
author: Higgsfield AI 🧩

title: Editorial poolside fashion photoshoot of a man
description: A rich, editorial-style prompt for photographing the same man from a reference at a luxurious pool, focusing on cinematic lighting and premium magazine aesthetics.
content: Create a high-quality, editorial-style photoshoot of the same man as in the reference, at a luxurious swimming pool during daytime. The scene has bright sunshine and perfectly clear weather. He is alone, posing classically and confidently for the camera as if for a fashion magazine cover. The lighting is minimal yet sophisticated, highlighting his face and outfit with soft, natural contrast. He is wearing a fashionable, well-tailored outfit suited for a summer poolside editorial, stylish, modern, and elegant. The pool water glimmers under the sunlight, with reflections adding depth and vibrance. The background is clean, with no people around, emphasizing the premium, cinematic aesthetic and polished magazine look.
author: Johnn

title: Otter scientists explaining the WiFi plane test
description: A humorous prompt where otter scientists use a whiteboard and a wall of photos to explain and celebrate passing the otters-on-a-plane WiFi benchmark.
content: Scientists who are otters are using a white board to explain ethan mollicks otter on a plane using WiFi test of AI (you must search for this) and demonstrating it has been passed with a wall full of photos of otters on planes using laptops
author: Ethan Mollick

title: Unplanned paparazzi-style street portrait of a man
description: A cinematic paparazzi-style close-up portrait prompt capturing a confident man amid a bustling crowd with harsh flash and street-fashion vibes.
content: Unplanned paparazzi style portrait, an intense, close-up moment capturing a man with striking features as he {argument name="pose" default="looks over his shoulder with a confident smirk"}. Shot from a slightly low angle, showing only his face and shoulders amidst a blurred, bustling crowd. The image feels raw and spontaneous, lit by a harsh flash, high-ISO texture. He's wearing {argument name="outfit" default="a dark turtleneck and stylish sunglasses"}, embodying effortless street style chic, the energy and atmosphere reminiscent of Paris Fashion Week chaos.
author: Heisenberg

title: Person relaxing on glowing cloud above the sky
description: A detailed photo-edit prompt that places the person from your reference photo relaxing on a glowing cloud at golden hour, ideal for dreamy, surreal portraits.
content: the person from the reference photo ( keep the face of the person 100% accurate from the reference image ) relaxing on a fluffy, glowing cloud high above the sky, surrounded by soft golden sunlight and vast layers of clouds stretching to the horizon. the person is lying back comfortably with a pillow, wearing a dark long-sleeve shirt, olive green pants, and glasses, holding a book in one hand and a coffee cup in the other. the lighting is cinematic and warm, capturing the golden hour ambiance with radiant highlights and gentle shadows across the clouds. captured with a wide-angle lens at medium depth of field, balancing focus between the subject and the surrounding dreamy sky. the overall atmosphere is surreal and serene, blending realism with fantasy in a peaceful, imaginative setting.
author: Nano Banana Labs

title: Annotated landmark images of Eiffel Tower, Great Wall, Colosseum, Taj Mahal
description: A multi-image prompt to generate four hyper-realistic landmark scenes with informative annotations overlaying key architectural and cultural details.
content:
Generate four distinct, hyper-realistic images, each depicting a world-renowned landmark. For each image, include a comprehensive and clearly legible set of annotations directly overlaid onto key architectural features, historical elements, or culturally significant details. These annotations should provide brief, informative descriptions.

The first image should feature the Eiffel Tower in Paris, France, at sunset, with annotations highlighting its iron lattice structure, observation decks, and historical significance.

The second image should showcase the Great Wall of China, specifically a section in Mutianyu, during a clear autumn day, with annotations detailing its watchtowers, construction materials, and strategic importance.

The third image should present the Colosseum in Rome, Italy, bathed in morning light, with annotations identifying its arches, seating tiers, and its role as an ancient amphitheater.

The fourth image should capture the Taj Mahal in Agra, India, under a soft, ethereal pre-dawn glow, with annotations pointing out its marble dome, minarets, and inlaid floral designs.

Each image should be rendered with exceptional detail, vibrant colors, and dynamic lighting to emphasize the grandeur of the location, making the annotations seamlessly integrated into the visual narrative.
author: ANKIT PATEL 🇮🇳 | AI

title: Oscars selfie as a character-select game screen
description: A playful prompt that turns eight people from a reference photo into a choose-your-character style video game selection screen.
content: Show these 8 people in a choose your character video game screenshot

description: A concise prompt to transform a photo of a speaker into a clean technical drawing, useful for product documentation or design work.
content: Create a technical drawing of this speaker

description: A fashion-edit prompt that swaps the user’s clothes to match those shown in a reference image while keeping everything else intact.
content: Take the clothing from the reference and change mine to match it

title: Generate an image in the style of a given moodboard
description: A style-transfer prompt that asks the model to create a new image matching the visual style of an uploaded moodboard.
content: Generate an image in the style of this moodboard
author: Misch Strotz

title: Wacky flowchart for toasting bread
description: A fun prompt to generate a wildly overcomplicated flowchart explaining how to toast bread, ideal for humorous instructional posters.
content: i need a flowchart for how to toast bread, make it as wacky and over the top and complicated as possible.
author: Ethan Mollick

description: An art-history-inspired prompt to generate a scene in the style of a follower of Jheronimus Bosch depicting Christ in Limbo, the Harrowing of Hell.
content: Follower of Jheronimus Bosch Christ in Limbo, “Harrowing of Hell” 1450–1516
